titleStmt.title: Concordance of the Chinese and Tibetan Buddhist Canons
titleStmt.author: Dan Zigmond

sourceDesc.p: Compiled from eight sources: SuttaCentral (existing), Lancaster catalogue, Lancaster full K-number scrape, Muller Tohoku index (acmuller), CBETA Jinglu Tibetan, CBETA Jinglu Sanskrit, rKTs, and 84000 TEI.

div.p: Total texts in corpus: 2455. Texts with Tibetan parallels: 838 (34.1%). Texts with any parallel: 1082 (44.1%).

link.note: acmuller_tohoku; cbeta_sanskrit; cbeta_tibetan; existing; lancaster; lancaster_full

entry.title: Ch'i fo fu mu hsing tzu ching
Pai i chin ch'uang erh p'o lo men yüan ch'i ching
Ni chü t'o fan chih ching
Ch'ang a han shih pao fa ching

entry.title: Yen lo wang wu t'ien shih che ching
A na lü pa nien ching
Fan chih chi shui ching ching
Shih mo nan pen ssu tzu ching
Ch'ü t'an mi chi kuo ching
Pi mo shih mu lien ching
Fan chih o po lo yen wen chung tsun ching
San kuei wu chieh tz'u hsin yen li kung te ching
Fo wei huang chu yüan lao p'o lo men shuo hsüeh ching
